## Checks

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run test:browser` when UI, scraping, launcher, or export behavior changes
- [ ] README, privacy, publishing, or security docs updated when behavior changes
- [ ] No new analytics, telemetry, remote logging, or server-side conversation processing
- [ ] Permissions remain limited to supported AI chat domains
